name: COM Object Downloading Cradles
notes:
This rule detects usage of COM objects that can be abused to download files in PowerShell by CLSID.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Potential COM Objects Download Cradles Usage - PS Script
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of COM objects that can be abused to download files in PowerShell by CLSID


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::gettypefromclsid(%' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%0002df01-0000-0000-c000-000000000046%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%f6d90f16-9c73-11d3-b32e-00c04f990bb4%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%f5078f35-c551-11d3-89b9-0000f81fe221%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%88d96a0a-f192-11d4-a65f-0040963251e5%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%afba6b42-5692-48ea-8141-dc517dcf0ef1%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%afb40ffd-b609-40a3-9828-f88bbe11e4e3%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%88d96a0b-f192-11d4-a65f-0040963251e5%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%2087c2f4-2cef-4953-a8ab-66779b670495%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%000209ff-0000-0000-c000-000000000046%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%00024500-0000-0000-c000-000000000046%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY COM Object Downloading Cradles on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::gettypefromclsid(%' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%0002df01-0000-0000-c000-000000000046%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%f6d90f16-9c73-11d3-b32e-00c04f990bb4%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%f5078f35-c551-11d3-89b9-0000f81fe221%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%88d96a0a-f192-11d4-a65f-0040963251e5%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%afba6b42-5692-48ea-8141-dc517dcf0ef1%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%afb40ffd-b609-40a3-9828-f88bbe11e4e3%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%88d96a0b-f192-11d4-a65f-0040963251e5%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%2087c2f4-2cef-4953-a8ab-66779b670495%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%000209ff-0000-0000-c000-000000000046%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%00024500-0000-0000-c000-000000000046%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: COM Object Downloading Cradles
Event description: Detects usage of COM objects that can be abused to download files in PowerShell by CLSID
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
